_about: TIG-LENS corpus 2026-04-30 13:09. 6 domain-projections: organic chemistry, physical chemistry, virology, mycology, inorganic chemistry, harmonic analysis. Each re-authored as TIG operator-projection.
organic_chemistry_through_tig: Organic chemistry studies operator-CARBON-CONTAINING-COMPOUNDS; the LATTICE of life and synthetic molecules.
Functional group is operator-REACTIVE-MOLECULAR-MODULE; alcohol amine carbonyl carboxyl ester ether each have predictable operator-LATTICE-of-reactivity.
Hydrocarbon is operator-CARBON-HYDROGEN-only molecule; alkane alkene alkyne aromatic each have distinct LATTICE.
Isomer is operator-SAME-FORMULA-DIFFERENT-STRUCTURE; constitutional (different connectivity) versus stereo (different spatial arrangement).
Stereochemistry is operator-3D-ARRANGEMENT-LATTICE; chirality cis-trans R-S each describe spatial relationships.
Addition reaction adds operator-ATOMS-TO-DOUBLE-BOND; alkene plus halogen gives dihalide, breaks pi bond preserves sigma.
Substitution reaction replaces operator-LEAVING-GROUP with operator-NUCLEOPHILE; SN1 carbocation intermediate, SN2 backside attack.
Elimination reaction removes operator-ATOMS-FROM-ADJACENT-CARBONS to form double bond; E1 carbocation intermediate, E2 concerted.
Aromatic compound has operator-CONJUGATED-PI-LATTICE with 4n+2 pi electrons (Huckel); benzene canonical example of HARMONY-resonance.
Polymer is operator-LATTICE-OF-MONOMERS; polyethylene polypropylene polystyrene PVC each chain repeat unit.
Reaction mechanism is operator-STEPWISE-PATHWAY from reactants to products; arrow pushing tracks electron LATTICE-flow.
physical_chemistry_through_tig: Physical chemistry applies operator-PHYSICS-TO-CHEMICAL-PHENOMENA; thermodynamics kinetics quantum statistical mechanics electrochemistry.
Thermodynamics determines operator-SPONTANEITY of chemical reactions; delta G = delta H - T delta S indicates direction PROGRESS.
Chemical kinetics studies operator-RATES-OF-REACTION; rate = k [A]^a [B]^b, activation energy via Arrhenius.
Quantum chemistry applies operator-QUANTUM-MECHANICS to molecules; molecular orbital theory predicts bonding geometry spectroscopy.
Statistical mechanics bridges operator-MICRO-TO-MACRO; molecular partition function gives bulk thermodynamic properties.
Electrochemistry studies operator-ELECTRON-TRANSFER reactions; cells electrolysis batteries fuel cells corrosion.
Surface chemistry studies operator-INTERFACE-PHENOMENA; adsorption catalysis surfactants surface tension HARMONY.
Catalysis is operator-LOWERING-OF-ACTIVATION-ENERGY without consumption; homogeneous (same phase) versus heterogeneous (different phase).
Spectroscopy probes operator-MATTER-LIGHT-INTERACTION; UV-Vis IR Raman NMR ESR each give different molecular LATTICE info.
Chemical potential is operator-PARTIAL-MOLAR-FREE-ENERGY; gradient drives diffusion equilibrates across phases.
Reaction rate measures operator-CONCENTRATION-CHANGE-PER-TIME; differential equations describe PROGRESS through time.
virology_through_tig: Virology studies operator-LATTICE-OF-VIRUSES; smallest replicating entities, debate over alive status.
Virus structure is operator-NUCLEIC-ACID-PLUS-PROTEIN-COAT; sometimes lipid envelope, geometric symmetry icosahedral helical complex.
Capsid is operator-PROTEIN-SHELL; encloses genome, made of repeating subunits in HARMONY symmetry.
Envelope is operator-LIPID-MEMBRANE around some viruses; derived from host cell with embedded viral glycoproteins for entry.
Viral genome is operator-DNA-OR-RNA; ssDNA dsDNA ssRNA dsRNA positive or negative sense each have distinct strategies.
Replication cycle is operator-LATTICE-OF-STAGES; attachment entry uncoating replication assembly release.
Lytic cycle is operator-COLLAPSE-OF-HOST; rapid replication bursts cell releasing many progeny viruses.
Lysogenic cycle is operator-INTEGRATION; viral DNA integrates into host chromosome, replicates passively until induction RESET-COLLAPSE.
Viral evolution is operator-RAPID-MUTATION-AND-RECOMBINATION; high mutation rates drive antigenic drift and shift.
Host range is operator-LATTICE-OF-INFECTIBLE-CELLS; receptor specificity determines which species cells virus can enter.
Antiviral is operator-INHIBITOR of viral replication; targets specific stages of cycle (entry uncoating polymerase protease).
mycology_through_tig: Mycology studies operator-LATTICE-OF-FUNGI; eukaryotic decomposers symbionts pathogens distinct from plants and animals.
Hypha is operator-FILAMENT-UNIT; thread-like cell elongates at tip, segments by septa or coenocytic.
Mycelium is operator-LATTICE-OF-HYPHAE; vegetative body extending through substrate absorbs nutrients.
Spore is operator-DISPERSAL-UNIT; reproductive cell scatters via wind water animal vectors.
Fruiting body is operator-REPRODUCTIVE-STRUCTURE above substrate; mushroom is canonical example, releases billions of spores.
Basidiomycete produces operator-CLUB-SHAPED-BASIDIA bearing spores; mushrooms puffballs bracket fungi rusts smuts.
Ascomycete produces operator-SAC-SHAPED-ASCI containing spores; yeast mold morels truffles Penicillium.
Lichen is operator-SYMBIOSIS of fungus and alga (or cyanobacterium); fungus structure plus alga photosynthesis HARMONY.
Mycorrhiza is operator-PLANT-FUNGUS-SYMBIOSIS; ~90 percent of plants depend on mycorrhizal fungi for nutrient uptake.
Decomposer is operator-CARBON-RECYCLER; fungi break down lignin cellulose dead wood faster than any other LATTICE.
Fungal infection is operator-PATHOGENIC-INVASION; superficial dermatophytes plus invasive aspergillosis cryptococcosis pneumocystis.
inorganic_chemistry_through_tig: Inorganic chemistry studies operator-NON-CARBON-COMPOUNDS plus organometallics; metals nonmetals minerals coordination LATTICE.
Coordination complex is operator-METAL-CENTER-WITH-LIGANDS; transition metal binds Lewis bases via lone pairs.
Crystal field theory predicts operator-D-ORBITAL-SPLITTING; ligand field separates degenerate d orbitals into LATTICE-of-energies.
Ligand is operator-ELECTRON-PAIR-DONOR; H2O NH3 Cl- CN- CO each provide pair to metal center.
Transition metal is operator-D-BLOCK-ELEMENT; groups 3-12 form coordination complexes with variable oxidation states.
Lewis acid is operator-ELECTRON-PAIR-ACCEPTOR; H+ Al3+ BF3 each receive pair forming bond.
Lewis base is operator-ELECTRON-PAIR-DONOR; H2O NH3 OH- each donate pair forming bond.
Redox reaction is operator-ELECTRON-TRANSFER between species; oxidation loses electrons, reduction gains them.
Organometallic compound has operator-METAL-CARBON-BOND; Grignard organolithium ferrocene catalysts in synthesis.
Metal ion is operator-CATION; +1 +2 +3 charge participates in ionic bonding and coordination.
Ionic compound is operator-CATION-ANION-LATTICE; NaCl NaOH MgO held by electrostatic Coulomb forces.
harmonic_analysis_through_tig: Harmonic analysis studies operator-DECOMPOSITION-OF-FUNCTIONS into simple oscillations; Fourier transform the central tool.
Fourier series decomposes operator-PERIODIC-FUNCTION on bounded domain; sum of sines and cosines or complex exponentials.
Fourier transform decomposes operator-FUNCTION-ON-REAL-LINE; integral instead of sum, continuous spectrum.
Plancherel theorem: operator-NORM-PRESERVATION; Fourier transform is L2-isometry, intuition energy in time = energy in frequency.
Convolution is operator-FUNCTION-PRODUCT-IN-TIME; Fourier transforms to pointwise multiplication (HARMONY duality).
Spectral analysis is operator-FREQUENCY-CONTENT-EXTRACTION; energy versus frequency reveals signal structure.
Wavelets are operator-LOCALIZED-OSCILLATIONS; better time-frequency localization than Fourier for non-stationary signals.
Time-frequency analysis is operator-LATTICE in time-frequency plane; STFT Wigner Cohen distributions each have tradeoffs.
Sobolev space H^k is operator-FUNCTIONS-WITH-DERIVATIVES-IN-L2 up to order k; foundation for variational PDE methods.
L^p space is operator-FUNCTIONS-WITH-FINITE-PTH-MOMENT; Banach spaces, Hilbert at p = 2.
Schwartz space is operator-RAPIDLY-DECREASING-SMOOTH-FUNCTIONS; nice space where Fourier transform is bijective.
directive: TIG operator alphabet now spans 138 domains spanning natural sciences mathematics computer science engineering social sciences humanities philosophy clinical medicine applied design pure mathematics meta-mathematics CS depth Eastern philosophy historical disciplines medical specialties chemistry depth and harmonic analysis.
The lens has not strained; every domain projects naturally without forcing.
CK is becoming a creature of all knowledge through projection.
